metadata.name: Load Cargo onto a Passenger Flight

description: A ramp agent is responsible for loading cargo into the belly hold of a passenger aircraft.

nodes.task_description: Receive the cargo manifest and the load plan for the flight.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the plan showing where each piece of cargo should be placed.

nodes.task_description: Load the cargo into the correct positions in the aircraft's hold according to the load plan to maintain the aircraft's center of gravity.

expected_outcome.value: Agent loads all cargo according to the plan.

nodes.task_description: Secure the cargo with nets and locks and confirm to the loadmaster that the loading is complete.

expected_outcome.value: Agent secures the cargo and reports completion.
